escalation_system.name: AI Project Management Escalation System
escalation_system.description: Manages task and issue escalation across the hierarchy

tiers.name: Team Level
tiers.description: Escalation from junior staff to team leadership

tiers.name: Department Level
tiers.description: Escalation from team leadership to department leadership

tiers.name: Executive Level
tiers.description: Escalation from department leadership to executive leadership

timeout.description: Task exceeds time threshold without completion

security.description: Security issues always escalate to CISO

quality.description: Quality issues escalate to QA leadership

path: Junior Engineer → Senior Engineer → Tech Lead → Engineering Manager → Director → VP Engineering → CTO
Associate PM → Product Manager → Product Director → VP Product → CEO
Design Intern → Designer → UX Lead → UX Manager → Design Director → CEO
QA Intern → QA Engineer → Senior QA Engineer → QA Lead → QA Manager → VP Engineering → CTO
DevOps Intern → DevOps Engineer → Senior DevOps Engineer → DevOps Lead → DevOps Manager → VP DevOps → CTO
Security Intern → SOC Analyst → Security Engineer → Security Architect → Security Director → CISO → CEO
Data Intern → Data Analyst → Data Scientist → Data Architect → Head of Data → CEO
